title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the force exerted by the seat on the passenger, we need to use Newton's second law of motion.

title: Newton's Second Law
text: Newton's second law states that force is equal to mass times acceleration. The formula is $$F=m a$$.

title: Calculate the Force
text: Use the formula $$F=m a$$, where $$m$$ is the mass of the passenger and a is the acceleration of the sled.
